data.title: ImmunityBio Addresses FDA Warning on ANKTIVA Promotion
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ImmunityBio ( (IBRX) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 6, 2026, ImmunityBio, Inc. announced it had submitted a comprehensive response to a March 13, 2026 Warning Letter from the U.S. FDA’s Office of Prescription Drug Promotion concerning a podcast and a television advertisement related to ANKTIVA. The company stated the television ad was never aired, removed the cited podcast from its own and third-party platforms, and initiated a broad review of promotional materials with legal and regulatory teams.

ImmunityBio outlined corrective and compliance measures including expanded promotional review protocols, mandatory executive training, and engagement of external regulatory counsel to oversee future high-visibility communications. The company also clarified that the statements cited in the podcast by Founder and Executive Chairman Dr. Patrick Soon-Shiong were intended as aspirational commentary on its IL-15-based oncology platform, seeking to reinforce its commitment to accurate, balanced promotion and to limit regulatory and reputational risk around its commercialization of ANKTIVA.

The most recent analyst rating on (IBRX) stock is a Hold with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ImmunityBio stock, see the IBRX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IBRX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IBRX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial fundamentals (large ongoing losses, heavy cash burn, and negative equity). Earnings-call updates provide a meaningful offset via strong ANKTIVA commercialization and expanding regulatory approvals, but near-term technical signals are still bearish and valuation remains hard to justify without profitability.

To see Spark’s full report on IBRX stock, click here.

More about ImmunityBio

ImmunityBio, Inc. is a commercial-stage biotechnology company focused on developing and commercializing next-generation immunotherapies targeting cancer and infectious diseases. Its core Cancer BioShield platform leverages a proprietary IL-15 superagonist to activate natural killer cells, cytotoxic T cells, and memory T cells, anchored by the first-in-class IL-15 agonist fusion complex ANKTIVA for BCG-unresponsive non-muscle invasive bladder cancer.

The company’s portfolio includes approved ANKTIVA in combination with BCG, as well as an investigational pipeline of adenovirus-vectored vaccines, allogeneic and autologous NK-cell therapies, and other immunomodulators aimed at inducing durable immune responses while potentially reducing reliance on high-dose chemo-radiation therapies.

Average Trading Volume: 39,794,519

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $7.51B

See more data about IBRX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Oracle Names New CFO Amid Strong Cloud Momentum
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Oracle ( (ORCL) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 6, 2026, Oracle appointed Hilary Maxson as Chief Financial Officer and Principal Financial Officer, succeeding Douglas Kehring, who will continue as Executive Vice President of Operations. Maxson, formerly Group CFO at Schneider Electric and a non-executive director at Anglo American, will lead Oracle’s global finance organization and receive a compensation package combining salary, bonus eligibility, relocation support, and a $26 million mix of time- and performance-based equity awards.

Her appointment comes as Oracle reports its strongest quarterly performance in over 15 years, with more than 20% growth in organic total revenue and non-GAAP EPS, driven by surging demand for cloud infrastructure, AI, multicloud databases, and applications. Bringing deep experience in scaling capital-intensive, infrastructure and software businesses, Maxson is expected to help optimize capital allocation and support Oracle’s rapid cloud expansion and long-term value creation for customers and shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (ORCL) stock is a Buy with a $320.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Oracle stock, see the ORCL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ORCL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ORCL is a Neutral.

The score is held back mainly by financial risk—very high leverage and sharply negative TTM free cash flow—despite strong profitability. Offsetting this, the latest earnings call was notably upbeat with rapid cloud/AI growth and a very large RPO backlog. Technicals are mixed (below key longer-term moving averages with negative MACD), while valuation appears moderately demanding (P/E ~27.9) with only a modest dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on ORCL stock, click here.

More about Oracle

Oracle is a global enterprise software and cloud computing company that offers integrated suites of business applications alongside secure, autonomous infrastructure through Oracle Cloud. The company focuses on cloud infrastructure, AI-driven services, multicloud database offerings, and industry-specific applications for large enterprises worldwide.

data.title: Soleno Therapeutics to Be Acquired by Neurocrine Biosciences
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Soleno Therapeutics ( (SLNO) ).

On April 5, 2026, Soleno Therapeutics agreed to be acquired by Neurocrine Biosciences, which will launch a cash tender offer at $53.00 per share, valuing Soleno’s equity at about $2.9 billion and representing a premium of roughly 34% to Soleno’s April 2 close. The deal, unanimously approved by both boards and supported by tender agreements from key Soleno shareholders, is expected to close within 90 days of the April 6, 2026 announcement, subject to majority tender, antitrust clearance and other customary conditions.

Upon completion, Soleno will merge into a Neurocrine subsidiary and become a wholly owned unit, with all remaining shares converted into the same $53.00 cash consideration and in‑the‑money stock options cashed out at the offer price. The transaction will add VYKAT XR, a fast‑growing, first‑in‑class Prader–Willi syndrome therapy with $190 million in 2025 sales, to Neurocrine’s existing INGREZZA and CRENESSITY franchises, broadening its rare‑disease endocrinology portfolio and creating a more diversified, durable revenue base supported by expected cost synergies and extended VYKAT XR patent life.

The most recent analyst rating on (SLNO) stock is a Hold with a $42.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Soleno Therapeutics stock, see the SLNO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SLNO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SLNO is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by the sharp 2025 financial inflection (revenue scale, profitability, positive free cash flow) and positive earnings-call momentum on launch execution and liquidity. These strengths are tempered by weak technicals (price below key moving averages with negative MACD) and a high P/E with no dividend support, which increases sensitivity to any slowdown or regulatory/commercial setbacks.

To see Spark’s full report on SLNO stock, click here.

More about Soleno Therapeutics

Soleno Therapeutics is a biopharmaceutical company focused on endocrinology and rare diseases, most notably Prader–Willi syndrome, a rare genetic neurodevelopmental disorder affecting about 10,000 patients in the U.S. Its lead product, VYKAT XR (diazoxide choline), is the first and only FDA‑approved treatment for hyperphagia in Prader–Willi syndrome and generated $190 million in revenue in 2025. Soleno listed on Nasdaq as SLNO and has positioned VYKAT XR as a foundational first‑line therapy supported by intellectual property expected to extend into the mid‑2040s.

Average Trading Volume: 1,688,816

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $2.04B

For a thorough assessment of SLNO stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Niu Technologies Posts 29% Q1 2026 Sales Jump on Strong China Demand, Unveils AI-Enabled NXT2.0
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Niu Technologies ( (NIU) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 6, 2026, Niu Technologies reported that it sold 261,624 units in the first quarter of 2026, a 29% year-on-year increase, driven by a 35% rise in China sales to 247,938 units while international volumes fell 32% to 13,686 units. The MT2026 model accounted for nearly 30% of domestic sales, and the late-March launch of the NXT2.0, featuring advanced AI-assisted navigation and a three-camera surround-view system, underscores Niu’s push into higher-end intelligent mobility and a shift toward prioritizing electric motorcycles internationally to improve long-term operational efficiency, though management noted that shipment volumes alone do not fully indicate quarterly financial performance.

The company highlighted continued robust momentum in its home market as it broadens its high-performance product portfolio and invests in AI-enabled riding experiences. At the same time, Niu is realigning overseas operations by focusing on the higher-growth electric motorcycle segment and optimizing its micro-mobility presence, a move that may pressure near-term international volume but is intended to strengthen its competitive position and operational footing in global electric two-wheeler markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (NIU) stock is a Hold with a $3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Niu Technologies stock, see the NIU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NIU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NIU is a Neutral.

Niu Technologies’ overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges, particularly in profitability and cash flow. While the earnings call provided some positive insights into growth and operational efficiency, technical analysis and valuation metrics indicate ongoing risks. The company’s strong performance in China is a positive factor, but overseas market challenges and regulatory uncertainties weigh on the outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on NIU stock, click here.

More about Niu Technologies

Niu Technologies is a Beijing-based provider of smart urban mobility solutions, designing, manufacturing and selling high-performance electric motorcycles, mopeds, bicycles, kick-scooters and e-bikes. The company serves varied urban travel needs through two main product lineups, spanning larger electric two-wheelers like the NQi, MQi, UQi and FQi series and micro-mobility products such as KQi kick-scooters and BQi e-bikes, sold via an omnichannel retail model.

Average Trading Volume: 508,007

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $220.6M

For a thorough assessment of NIU stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An announcement from Gencan Capital ( ($TSE:GCA.X) ) is now available.

Gencan Capital Inc. reported that Ubercrete Advanced Materials has launched a non-brokered private placement of up to $5 million at $0.25 per share, tied to their planned reverse takeover transaction. The financing is intended to fund Ubercrete’s working capital needs, including ongoing product development, commercialization initiatives and general corporate purposes.

Completion of the reverse takeover and the associated financing remains contingent on a definitive agreement, due diligence, shareholder and regulatory approvals, and successful closing of the placement. The update underscores both the growth ambitions around Ubercrete’s concrete technology platform and the transaction risk that still exists for investors and other stakeholders while conditions remain outstanding.

Ubercrete Advanced Materials Inc. is a technology company focused on transforming traditional concrete through proprietary formulations and processes for commercial and residential projects. data.title: Anterix Sells 900 MHz Licenses to NorthWestern Energy
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Anterix ( (ATEX) ) is now available.

On April 6, 2026, Anterix announced that subsidiary PDV Spectrum Holding sold 900 MHz broadband licenses to NorthWestern Energy, covering portions of Montana, South Dakota, and Wyoming. The deal includes a 6 MHz broadband configuration in nine counties and a 10 MHz configuration elsewhere, following recent FCC approval expanding Anterix’s 900 MHz allocation.

The NorthWestern Energy agreement marks the first planned deployment of Anterix’s 10 MHz broadband configuration, nearly doubling capacity available to utilities for private wireless grid communications. As the tenth utility to secure Anterix spectrum, NorthWestern’s adoption underscores a broader industry shift toward private, utility‑controlled networks to modernize grids, enhance wildfire‑risk monitoring, and improve outage response over vast, remote territories.

The most recent analyst rating on (ATEX) stock is a Hold with a $41.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Anterix stock, see the ATEX Stock Forecast page.

Technicals are moderately supportive with an uptrend and positive MACD. The earnings call was constructive (higher cash proceeds guidance, OpEx cuts, commercial momentum), but regulatory and execution timing risks remain. Valuation is a secondary drag given the negative P/E and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on ATEX stock, click here.

data.title: Revolve Secures Key Grid Deal for 130 MW EL24 Wind Project in Mexico
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ReVolve Renewable Power Corp ( (TSE:REVV) ) just unveiled an update.

Revolve Renewable Power has secured a final interconnection agreement with Mexico’s state utility CFE for its 130 MW EL24 wind project in Tamaulipas, a key step that confirms grid access rights, connection capacity and the point of interconnection. The company has also obtained the first environmental permit from SEMARNAT and already holds a final generation permit, making EL24 one of only five wind projects nationwide to clear this regulatory hurdle.

With grid interconnection and regulatory approvals in place, Revolve will now focus on final engineering, turbine optimization and evaluating commercial options such as construction financing, strategic partnerships and potential monetization. The company is targeting a ready-to-build milestone in late 2026 and commercial operation in 2028, positioning EL24 as a de-risked growth asset within Mexico’s wind sector and a potential value driver for shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:REVV) stock is a Hold with a C$0.18 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ReVolve Renewable Power Corp stock, see the TSE:REVV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on REVV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, REVV is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak and volatile financial performance, including FY2025 losses, negative cash flow, and elevated leverage. Technicals provide some support with the stock trading above major moving averages, but valuation remains challenged due to negative earnings and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on REVV stock, click here.

More about ReVolve Renewable Power Corp

Revolve Renewable Power Corp. is a North American owner, operator and developer of utility-scale renewable energy projects, including wind, solar, hydro and battery storage, with operations in the U.S., Canada and Mexico. The company also develops sub-20 MW distributed generation assets, holds over 3,000 MW of utility-scale projects and a 140 MW+ DG pipeline, and has a track record of taking projects from greenfield to ready-to-build and sale, having developed and sold more than 1,550 MW to date.

data.title: Greenpro Capital Closes Share Exchange and Dilutive Offering
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Greenpro Capital ( (GRNQ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On February 13, 2026, Greenpro Capital Corp. agreed to acquire a 13.6% minority stake in British Virgin Islands-based Forekast Limited via a share exchange, and on March 31, 2026 it closed the deal by purchasing 1,360 Forekast ordinary shares in return for issuing 8.5 million new common shares. The transaction, executed as a private placement under Regulation D, did not give Greenpro control of Forekast but significantly diluted existing shareholders and shifted ownership, with new Forekast-linked investors collectively holding more than half of Greenpro’s outstanding stock as of the closing date.

The share issuance increased Greenpro’s outstanding common stock from 8,625,813 shares on March 30, 2026 to 17,125,813 shares on March 31, 2026, reducing board and management’s combined ownership from 39.67% to 19.98%. Principal new shareholders BHL Ltd., Moira Venture Limited, Renhari Limited, Joharne Limited, Crescent East Limited and Stratifi Global Limited emerged with sizeable stakes, marking a major change in the company’s shareholder base and potentially influencing future governance and strategic direction.

More about Greenpro Capital

Greenpro Capital Corp. is a Nevada-incorporated company whose operations and sector focus are not described in this release, but it is an SEC-reporting issuer with common stock outstanding and a base of directors, officers and institutional shareholders. The company’s capital structure features a relatively concentrated insider and principal shareholder ownership, which is being reshaped by recent equity issuances.

Average Trading Volume: 22,124

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $26.14M
